star_1.text: This is(was) one of my favorite games ever on any platform. Now, it takes orbs to level legendaries, so we are back to square one. That's without mentioning heroes and gear leveling/enchants. Absolutely disgusting money hungry developers. The newest update is even worse, somehow. If you like to spend $20k+ on games, then this is the one for you. Every time they make it "easier," it's actually harder to get cards.

I really loved this game like a year+ ago, but it's so overloaded with bloated categories that logging in means visiting 8 menus and sorting thru miscellaneous stuff before you can even play matches. The core gameplay is still fun, but it's clear they just want you to buy stuff, pay to advance tier systems, and more than 10 types of in-game currency, and how to upgrade the major units keeps changing. It's just messy, expensive, and overwhelming. I quit.

Do NOT spend money. Spend money on a season pass only to find they have 4 different passes. So you spend $10 only to have your rewards mean nothing. Very difficult to figure out which pass you have as well. Game makes no sense. leveling up in game, maxing your guys and still lose? I love a good strategy but this one is lost. Was super fun, but once you get into it the game fizzles fast. Do NOT waste your money. I did and have serious regret

Don't Bother. They just took away all the equipment and replaced it with spells and perks. Basically, it is a new game and some aspects are starting over. New updates require a lot of gold. They take things away often that people pay for, definately grind for, then bring it back the next year making you spend more time and more money to get it again. They nerf cards that were popular but aren't making them money anymore, not for balance, unbalancing the game. Joyless cash grab.

I've been playing for 2 years. Now the micro-purchases are numerous. Each new addition to the game comes with a plethora of purchases needed to obtain new stuff. You can add this to all those other games you've stopped playing because the purchases have become too much I came back and have been playing with the same clan. my clan mates and myself all agree that the pay to play has become much more rampant. ive been stuck without progressing or growing my characters

Used to really enjoy this game. Have been playing for a few years. I have spent my fair share on this game, but it can no longer be enjoyed when developers pump out new units that way outdamage older Legendaries just to get people to spend money leveling the new units. Then the cycle simply repeats. Make older Legendary units playable again. Give the playerbase more variety to choose between for their team setup. No fun to load into a game and see the oppnents team and already know youx̌ve lost.

RUSH ROYALE ROBBED ME OF MY ACCOUNT, MY.GAMES KNOWS ABOUT IT AND DID NOTHING TO FIX THE ISSUE. I had a connection issue, and when I restarted my game I had been wrongly banned. i contacted support, and still haven't received a response. i have spent good money including regularly purchased season passes and more, I've invested a lot of time in this game and planned on continuing to play. I will not start a new account if my originally account cannot be restored

They advertise single player option, but there isn't one. The algorithm for wins is very difficult to figure out. You may have more characters that are stronger than your opponents, and still lose. It has become a pay-to-win game, with multiple upgrade options, and not be able to upgrade your characters because you don't have the proper upgrades available for your characters. Players end up spending money for items they can't use. Very frustrating.

The new update has completely ruined my experience, as im sure it has for many other players aswell. This update removed a huge portion of game mechanics. Equipment was not perfect, it was extremely difficult to get good equipment that complements your deck, with or without paying for it. When you play for a while eventually you'll get there and now its been all ripped away. Also matchmaking is broken now, majority of my opponents have multiple maxed units and im not close to even having one

Game can be fun, but can also be very frustrating. There are ongoing connections issues and the algorithms pre-determine the outcome of some of the battles and which characters are or aren't upgraded by the Scrapper character skill. The game is also trending more to pay to play. It's getting more difficult to advance your characters as a f2p player. I have contacted support but there is no resolution. They just tell me the algorithms are fine (which they clearly are not) or to try reinstalling.

My review was reported by the developer so here is an updated version with 1 star. They automatically click ads in the app and that shouldn't be allowed. I bought the battle pass only to find out there's like 6 more different battle passes and the one I bought wasn't even a premium version. The game is fun but they want you to spend thousands to compete.

Ok let's try this again. I am getting EVERYTHING refunded because you didn't listen. your product, according to play store standards, is defective. Double checked and verified. there's evidence all over the Internet that you have had plenty of warning that your game crashes constantly. do not ever charge me for a game that doesn't work again. Let me be clear: don't be polite to me. don't copy and paste some stupid reply. Your game scores in the red for disconnects and developer reliability.

I got to play a short time after closing the game once it would not restart just sits loading. I even uninstalled and reinstalled still nadda. Waste of my time. So it would be nice to contact support I don't have that option from the loading screen I will attempt to do so from other avenues but days later and the issues persists. As of October 3

definitely PAY 2 PLAY! They try every way they can to get you to spend money in the app and basically impossible to level up beyond a certain point without paying. I just got tricked in the store with my hard earned runes. deleted won't play a game where the company shows a complete lack in morals to their players. decent play but not worth the time if you want to get into the game.

Was a good game till the latest update. the ability to pick and choose what you want leveled for specific gear was taken away and replaced with random nonsense. I personally spent over 500ish dollars and 1500+ hours building the perfect deck only to have it taken away. . . Edit- before the update I could do 11 minutes solo on co-op level 14 now I'm lucky to do 7 minutes I went from 4700% crit to less than 3200% after spending more than 1500 hours. a lot of people are pissed off.

I've been playing this game since release. It started as a very fun strategy game. In the last year, they have absolutely ruined this game with a complete change to how you acquire units & heroes. Yes, micro transactions have always been in the game. But in times past, they weren't imperative to your progression. Now, if you don't have a particular critical level, you can't even progress your cards past a certain level. Meaning you're forced to spend to progress, or spend 6 months for 1 level.

Edit: I've played this game for 2 years. didn't mind buying the passes since I actually got rewards for it + playing without a pass was still fun. But they completely nuked the game - every few months, they get rid of more rewards and ask for more money for less. The fact that they're asking us to pay for what we used to get for free is wild. I thought people were overreacting, but you get nothing for your money. Don't bother with it if you can't spend 100s.

Cash Grab... this game used to be fun, played over a year, but became increasingly expensive. Everything is pay for this, pay for that, which makes it super annoying. I've probably put up about $1000 over my time playing this game, but just realized that this game will keep demanding more money to get some good cards. Before, it used to be 1 or 2 things that required a payment for an Event PASS. Now, there are at least 8 different events going on almost at the same time. Developers money hungry.

Good game. Decent explanation of tower unit behavior. Having no control of tower type and placement is a frustrating wrinkle. But bosses randomly change towers in what seems like a random way without any explanation. It's hard to feel good about a strategy game that gives such little control over your own fate. Edit: boss attacks are completely ridiculous. They shouldn't have such random and strong sway. Even if it works in my favor, it ruins the actual match.

It's pretty easy to learn but I hate the fact that when you lose your set back and that makes it frustrating especially when you're just playing this game to earn points on another game! Even when I level up and do whatever I can I still keep losing and getting set back and that's not fun. I know I wasn't here to enjoy the game but it sure does help when you can enjoy the game even for earning points for another.

star_2.text: Re-downloaded the game after a year. I've been playing every night for about 30mins-1hr on a daily basis for 3 weeks now. There's very little I could do to win in PVP. The game is unfortunately pay to win. most players I'm paired up with have several legendaries leveled up. most items to purchase are very expensive. this isolates folks like me who on a rare occasion will spend $.99 on something that makes the game more fun. I find myself playing co-op just to end on a good note.

Sadly I think i have to quit playing. I think i have close to 800 active days in game. spent at a min of 25$ a month. for no ads and the monthly seasonal pass. but for a long time now the devs don't balance they nerf into the ground. without spending insane money you can't keep up with the meta and the stuff you commit to overtime gets nerfed into unusable. the most fun I've had in a mobile game but I can't justify the cost and the regular resets. but if you can highly recommend

super fun and addicting game that I found out about on the "vibes" app. one of those play games for $$$. but Im giving it 2 stars, even though it's hella fun, because stupid game keeps crashing on me after I win/lose a match and try to watch the video ads for either a victory chest or a support chest. once it crashes, I never get what was inside those chest to level up my team.

I actually really like this game. The issue is the number of pay-to-win features they have. After every game, there is a pop-up saying to pay $4.99 for this or $3.99 for that. They have multiple game passes and a ton of pay features that make the game pay to win. So many ad opportunities to get ahead. All the pages have notifications on them that don't go away. Before playing a match, I collect the dailies and received 4 pop-ups to pay for boosters and cards, that's ridiculous.

I haven't had the game very long, I was just learning how to play, and it stopped finding players for me to battle. I retry several times (10+) before I give up and close the game. Out of the 4 or 5 days, I've tried to play this week, it's only found 3 people to battle. There needs to be non-human substitutes for cases like this. I want to play but can't, I'm probably deleting the game soon.

Has a lot of potential but at higher levels the match ups are frustrating. many times you are put against someone way ahead. what is most frustrating is the supposed to be "random" way I can not seem to get an attacker in pvp. i will get all kinds of support characters over and over again and usually lose because I just can't get an attacker. mind you I spend no money on the game. there is plenty of opportunities to spend money on this game and it would probably give you a much bigger advantage

It is a good time sink but lacks most of the old and starting characters are still unfinished even though they keep adding full characters. Seems like they could take the time to bring the characters so they are filled out and would make the game much more playable for everyone because if characters don't have abilities how can you use them for new strategies.

very fun game but the pay to play is too strong. It's impossible to progress after a certain point and if you do spend money like I did to build an amazing deck, your units will eventually get nerfed. In my eyes this is very clearly designed to keep you spending more and more. I wish they'd just do a subscription so we could all progress normally. I came back this month to see if things had changed and they are just as bad as ever. bon voyage!

TD in name only. It seems like just a money sink. Don't control placement. There are no range mechanics. No pathing, seemingly no offline mode. I really don't see any strategy in this game other than deciding when to merge. As far as I can tell, the only thing that determines whether or not you win is if you have upgraded your towers. To be completely honest, the advertisement for the game was cooler than the actual game. Merging different towers for a combination of abilities is cooler.

It's a fun game! But man the price gouging is bad. It's worked into the game so much that I get upset when it breaks and won't play ads, bc I miss out. They also try to charge you for every single tiny little thing. Gems for real money, sure, but also "passes"... problem is there are about 5 passes per season and even when I bought one it only lasted a few days until they wanted me to upgrade (it was useless after that). Not cool. The ads themselves are also predatory, good luck clicking "X" lol

Played this game a while and absolutely loved it. I spent some coin on it, too...and at first, you progress fairly well. They changed a few things in the update that were pretty great....until you realize you hit a brick wall at legendaries.....and so you buy that expensive in-game purchase thinking that will keep you in the game, but you'd be wrong. If games like this would just offer a subscription and take out the redundant season bundle scams, they would be better for 90% of players.

First, I played for 2 or so years. Predictably on every battle seems to be predetermined. I have spent a fair amount of money trying to advance, and granted, I still do well, but the gameplay from game to game is so robotic, I can almost determine which unit will be spawned before it happens. Second, why in the world would we keep getting cards for maxed out units and not be able to use them for something at some point? I have 1200 cards of units that are useless rewards I can't use.

This game is a neat concept, but there are so many popups for promotions and limited time deals, it is very obnoxious. And the tutorial doesn't teach you a few things. Most annoying though is that if you have 5 towers that only target the 1st enemy, you will waste a TON of dps, cause they all fire on the front enemy, then the 2nd wave of shots are wasted, cause the monster is dead. So your dps is half unless you have random targeting towers, which isn't always the case. It's very annoying.

Very meh, have been playing for about a year now and the only way to compete now is with money. I have purchased the seasonal pass a couple of times before and now they reduced the rewards but keep the same price tag. I am sure it will only get worse. Fun in the beginning, now not so much. Stay away unless you have deep pockets. Side note: whoever wrote the games algorithm either works for a casino or the lottery, it's that bad.

I really wanted to like this game. A part of me still does, I mean it's fun and unique. But the absolutely horrid connection issues and completely absurd microtransactions are just too much. In the past week my game has frozen at least 40 times and 3 games have been disconnected early without any rewards given out and no tokens/maps/tickets refunded either. Fix the game and lower the prices and I'll think about returning. Goodbye

The game forces your losses. If you have been on a winning streak, the game will suddenly hose your RNG. I've gone entire games without pulling all 5 of my selected characters. Multiple times. Today, right before writing this review. It's frustrating to hit a wall that you can't conquer because the devs algorithms don't play fair. This will ultimately be a huge waste of your time, and not the good kind.

Has good enough gameplay and seems well made. only gets 2 stars because not only is it nothing like the ads, the ads looked like far better games in ways that were unique. The actual game is a style that's been done several times over, which isn't inherently bad, but leaves this game as a far cry from what they dangle in front of your face to get you to download it.

One of the biggest fails of this game is the don't have the names of the characters in the units area. When they have challenges for specific characters and having to click on each character to find the specific one is just poor game mechanics. The absolute Ludacris pricing on majority of the buys is wild knowing you could support your game thru add revenue. Access to elite players without purchasing should be available, I haven't seen that yet ( maybe it is ). Overall the game is fun. TBC

At first the game is fun. It's a TD, with a live person (presuming). But, each unit deployed is RNG based. You can't choose whom you're getting. It's annoying hoping you'll have a high level attacker (as you merge units), only to get a unit you havent leveled up in that match. Lost 6 games in a row mainly cuz only my support class was used. Connection issues plague the game as well. Have wifi and kept getting DCed. Eventually, good units are paid. Overall, 3.5/10

The game play and events are great. The cards/units have unique abilities, and building your deck and playing it effectively is part of the fun. BUT.......This game is so geared toward pay to win it takes any fun factor or competitive drive out of the game. And we aren't just talking a few bucks here or there. To get characters to a competitive level, you will need $100s of dollars, and their is no option to grind to get them. Cash grab Cash grab Cash grab. Matchmaking is atrocious.

star_3.text: Super Fun!! No Ads unless you want free stuff. Doesn't take any money to progress to a decently high level. But the payments on these mobile games is insane. Kind of like Coin Rush but worse. If you spend $20+ it will only generally make you play at a 0.5%-5% higher level and after playing for a few days you are now stuck wanting to pay more money. Insanely expensive prices!!!!! But.....you can play the game free with no ads and do PVP rather successfully if you stick with high damage guys.

Of all the games I've ever played, this is the one I understand the least as far as how wins and losses are determined. I've scoured their knowledge library, tried countless combinations of cards based on stats, on abilities, on synergies, and still I consistently face more enemies than my opponent and I don't know why. I'm sure there is a game mechanic reason but they are doing a great job keeping it a secret.

This game is a shameless cash grab. There is no pretense to balance matches. The premium pass is a joke. For 7.99 only gets you 10 days. You don't get unlimited protection from losing trophies. Only a limited number of losses each day. I could see that as fare if things were balanced but the game is far from it. So I routinely go up against opponents with better everything. Units, Heroes, Stats.

It's a fun game. Finding a good clan is key , and you will grow quickly ( 4 star rating) (Update, to a 1 star ) the game was amazing and they push more, amd more for spending with each update. Now have changed how you lvl up, 2 times in a few months and this update was a total game killer. Many have quit and pretty sure it's over for me also. Really sad they ruined their great game.

Matches aren't balanced unless it's the Mirror Match mode, which is infrequent. Ads for anything outside of the game are optional, but instead they'll inundate you with pop ups for paid features in this game. Rather than improving existing units, like the portal keeper that still doesn't have any talents, they just keep adding new shiny ones. It's fun to play when you aren't constantly paired up against a player with a much more powerful deck (old max levels vs. just about anyone else).

Got hooked on this game and stayed hooked for about 2 years now. I even spent a little in it (around 50$ altogether). I don't know what it is but ever since August I've been having really poor connection. I thought that after this update it'd be better but it's worse. I get timed out and the game closes on itself, it freezes a lot then closes, and in the middle of battle it'll just freeze and stay that way. Pretty glitchy. Other than that it's a fun game.

it's not worth it, it may be cool but it's a huge pay to win game, and half the time as with other people having this problem, you get kicked out of the app, and then it gets so bad to a point where you can't even load into the game before you get kicked out, don't waste your money, it might seem cool but it's not worth a dime. I have lost one account that I spent on, and now a second one, and they forgot my account even when I logged in with their "saving progress" account.

Fun, engaging, even addictive game. Easy to learn, easy to play, but also an easy place to spend your entire lottery winnings trying to get ahead. That's because the costs of leveling up heroes and units increases exponentially, and even worse for legendaries. You can easily spend over $100 and still not get enough to upgrade one legendary unit. And grinding for it will take you weeks or months. So the game will go from a fun game to an unaffordable hobby in about a week of game play.

Very fun game, packs and stuff are expensive compared to other games but you can f2p and still have fun. Very helpful support, I lost my account because it got unbound and I logged out and they restored it for me. Edit: it's a very fun game with a caveat. You will have to fight people you can't beat. Especially in clan tournaments. I'm in the middle of the pack having to fight whales twice as strong as me. That is slowly killing the fun for me and I may be quitting soon.

I WANT to give this game 5 stars. The quality is great (instructions, graphics, interface, community/clans, events - superb), fun and engaging, overall it is a wonderful game. My problem is the overwhelming pay-to-play design of the game. I don't mind ads to upgrade and improve, but there are not enough free (ad-based) or low cost options. I cannot afford $15 seasonal for instance in an app like this. Again wonderful game, enjoy playing it - wish there were more no or low cost ways to progress.

It's pretty fun, and quite addicting but there's two problems I have with this game. One: yes the gameplay is different than clash royale, but you could at least come up with your own menu layout and looks. You didn't even try to hide it. Two: tribunal is really irritating. It takes up half of the defence but the cost to get another defender is still the same as before (usually pretty high) so your defence is left crippled for the rest of the game.

This game is a blast... But you're either putting in too much time, or too much money. Legendary cards are a pain to collect and an even bigger pain to level up. Also, gold is a problem. I could spend $300+ and still not have enough gold to level up a the cards that are waiting. While I'm at it... Beginning to really get sick of being disconnected every time I'm doing well on a match. Most recent update as of 9/13/22 has not fixed this issue at all.

It's fun to play, but the ads are super glitchy, often freezing or crashing the game. So even if you want to watch them, it's not worth it and makes the game rather clunky. It's like, "oh, here's this super easy quest, just watch an ad!" And you end up grinding the pvp zone for a million damage points instead because the ads are the worst. I want to like it more, but it's so frustrating to be held back by something so simple.

This game could be good. It is fun if you don't take it too seriously. But the devs continue to overdevelop restrictions making the game less and less playable without financial contribution. Games with this many ads can't reasonably expect people to pay more money. Likewise, games that charge money to play, not even to win, cannot reasonably play ads. The game mechanics are good. The randomness of unit appearance needs some work. Artwork is lovely.

I would give it more stars but it's very frustrating when the other person has a poor connection so it freezes you and you end up losing the game. Thats not fair at all. If the other person disconnects it should be an automatic win for you. Please do something about this. Edit; thank you for updating that part. But now it's extremely one sided game play. You will lose no matter what to a certain set up deck that EVERYONE has bc they spent money on it. Ever since the update to Demon Hunter.

This is a great game. Unfortunately, it has LOADS of tech issues. I reached a pretty high level, when it quit letting me battle. Issues tend to arise after most updates, as was the case with this issue. I was told, after almost 2 wks that they couldn't figure it out & I'm basically out of luck. Unless you're willing to deal with something like that, I wouldn't bother starting the game. Very disappointed.

Absolutely loved playing this game until the new dungeons update. Co-op has always been my go-to but now I can't play it as often as I'd like. Pvp is dreadful and now it's the only option. I'd suggest maybe instead of using a key each time for co-op, you only use one if the match was lost. That way, players can play more and still enjoy the game. I was excited to pay for the next season's rewards, but now I don't want to. Until co-op is fixed, Absolutely not spending more of my money.

I've been playing the game a couple years now and have noticed a couple trends. The game is pretty good. The concept is fun! And they're really aren't any ads that you are forced to watch against your will. However, the model has drastically shifted towards a pay-to-play model. Once you get closer to 2,000 critical damage. It becomes very slow to gain money and upgrade crystals to upgrade characters. The early game is pretty quick and you do pull the strongest characters relatively quickly.

This game is pretty fun, and you can actually play it without having to pay anything. It's nice that you don't have to pay to get more lives like all the other games. You can just play it all day if you want. UPDATED REVIEW **** despite enjoying the "dungeon floor" mini game, I really do with it hadn't replaced the coop. I used to play this game all day long and really liked that the coop could be played back to back for hours on end, but now you have to wait for hours to get keys just to play

Had to to change my rating, which was originally 5 stars, because they took away the traditional co-op feature. Only allowing a certain amount of times to play the new "co-op" is such a downgrade. The old co-op was the main reason for playing this game and now I honestly want to unintall. Too bad because I've spent quite a bit if money here too. Truly unfortunate.

star_4.text: Great game, the mechanics need to be reworked some. There's, what I call a "helping hand" that can be good when you first play the game. But later on, it will actually ruin your strategy by moving your units around after a few seconds of not making a move on your own. It's meant to help, but just waiting and letting your units continue to do damage, it will combine your units for you. And there's no way to turn this function off, or do anything about it at all. It's lost me a lot of matches!!!

I'm a new player, so I don't know what the game was like before, but I'm really ike it so far. I feel like I'm advancing at a steady pace and I understand how to improve. It's been less than a week F2P and right now I'm at arena 9, I have 2 common heroes, 14 epic cards and 2 legendary cards. The purchase options aren't nearly as intrusive as a lot of other games I've played. I feel for all of the OGs who feel like their fave game was ruined, but if you're a new player, I think you'll enjoy it.

Really addicting game. I've played quite a bit and I thoroughly enjoy it. Ads are bare minimum and you only have to watch them to get extra stuff which is is nice to not have them constantly popping up. Only thing I do not like is the price of things. I have no problem spending money on a game if I enjoy it, but 11.99 for a battle pass? I'd spend 2-3 dollars 10 times on a game I enjoyed, but I'll never spend that much on 1 single purchase. Over 100 dollars for the most crystals? Not a chance.

The in game purchases are expensive. I wish they were cheaper. Keep experimenting with different setups, make sure you upgrade your characters. And grind it out. I've made it to League 6 and 7, and it starts to get really hard. The players are much better, so I enjoy the challenge. And unlimited play option to try out different teams would be a great improvement.

It was great until they changed it and took away from letting us play co-op and now limit the amount you're allowed to play without paying. They got greedy and it feels pointless to spend more than a few minutes let alone any money on the game. ***********UPDATE*********** The game is getting better. They have made a few things a little OP but they're trying to fix it.

Update: Ive been playing for about a year now and spent $$. Game is still fun and devs continually update. Biggest issue for devs to tackle next is ads are too long now. This is a fun game. I enjoy it; however, there are WAY too many types of currency in the game. I literally cannot keep up with the hundreds of different things I need to upgrade my cards. Things need to be far more streamlined. This also prevents progress after a certain point and the game becomes very, very stagnant.

Can be fun. I shouldn't be regularly losing due to the rng before the battle even gets going. Has potential but developers want too much money for everything. People are generally willing to buy more when things cost less. Especially on a distraction. Best mechanic is the clan tourny system but the matchmaking isn't great for that either. They also heavily focus one legendary each update to make overpowered and try to get people to buy because they will lose to a level 11 when running a level 15

A surprisingly cute game. Simple to play, colorful and cartoony, you can watch a fair number of ads if you choose, but you don't have to. Although, gets a little difficult to advance if you don't. You'd get a 5 star if you didn't HAVE TO pay money to get into higher leagues and if cards were better balanced. Sooooo sick of getting annihilated by decks with the same few cards. These days, primarily demon hunter. Just makes the game boring if you have to play with the same cards over to win.

Great game, takes time to play and get new cards to upgrade units and such. The community is at large incompetent, so I found it rather easy (until you find a pay2win player, then they stomp you no matter what. Only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is the nasty underhanded clickbate they deliver for (50% off sales that are NOT sales, it's just regular price they're trying to get people to buy because it has a 50% off sticker slapped on it).

Game won't connect. I've had this problem a lot lately. I've seen google play reviews about the problem, and the reviewer is told to connect with support WITHIN the game. How are we supposed to connect with support withing the game if we can't load the game?? So I'm hoping for connection issues to get better, I guess, or I can't play at all. I liked the game a lot. 🙁 Edit: the latest versions of the game have worked for me. Progression is slow if you don't spend money. Otherwise a great game.

Shy of the prices for in-game content(could be cheaper for what you get), this game is damn near perfect, and beats the pants off of Random Dice! Way better animations, game sounds aren't annoying like in Random Dice, the RNG is a million times better. I would give it 5 stars, but like I said, in-game content needs to be a lot cheaper.

Great little casual game. Overall this game is easy to play, with just a bit of strategy to keep you interested. Matches are nice and fast, and the game is fun. Zero forced ads is nice, you only get ads when opening a victory or support chest. My main complaint is the amount of in-app purchases and premium currency. There's quite a lot of in your face buy our stuff, money hungry tactics I don't agree with.

The developers intentionally make the game insanely hard to progress, just to get you to pay. The idea if wonderful, pvp mode is too easy, and co op is unbeatable at certain points. The matchmaking system is terrible and the game is extremely pay to win. It's still fun. Been playing for months, pretty much every day. Everything in this game is rng. There isn't much skill.

This game is a lot of fun but the amount of money expected for each and every transaction is absolutely outrageous. In order to level up a single unit to max level (out of a team of 5 units) you would need to either work free to play for I would guess around 10 years playing every day or you would need to spend an amazing amount of money. $60 bundles in this game will only barely get you any further in progress, I would wager the high end players have spent $10,000+ on this game. It's insane

Updated review: it's a good game. A lot of ads, but you can choose to not have any which I appreciate. The price of the in game currency is nuts. The card unlock rate is seriously too slow. If the cards are going to be unbalanced (which they are pretty heavily) then the unlock rate should be much higher. All that considered, it's still fun enough that I play it pretty regularly. Request: can we swap tamer/warlock spawn order in co-op?

Great game to pass the time. Was so addicted to this when I downloaded it for the first time. But after a while you just hit a wall where you can't advance unless you spend money. You have to play the game vigorously and religiously only to get enough points and attempt to get a legendary unit. Even then, without spending money you are very limited to the types of legendary units you can get. In conclusion, great game, but hard to advance to higher levels without money.

Game is cool but don't ever expect to hit any kind of growth. Not only do you rarely get legendary cards, To level them 1 level you have to sacrifice legendary cards to get a "magic crystal" plus duplicates of the card, You can usually buy 1 legendary card for like $24.99... They even have hero skills, Once again, dont expect to level anything aside from common. Sucks because all facets of this game are amazing, You'll just never get to experience anything but the bottom tier in a lifetime.

Pretty early on the review. Only been playing for about 20-ish minutes. Seems like your typical card brawler game with some TD mixed in. Can level up cards like clash games, and you unlock cards through chests. Can pay IRL money to get chests, or in game currency to get more cards, although the card selection is random. Many free level up rewards as well, so you arent forced to pay. Although the game is not shy about tempting you to pay money.

If I could figure out HALF of the bits and bobs, ths n' thats and doodads, I might actually do halfway decent. As it stands, the game is soon congested with little add-ons, upgrades, enhancements, and modifiers... and thats just the ones that pertain to the player's characters (fighters). I am having a hard time figuring out what the best things to use and what is a waste and what I should buy since there's lots of subsc items to keep up. But I digress, it's still lots of fun

It's a pretty good game but there are some things I'd like to see added. It would be nice to be able to view clan mate's battles to watch them live. I'd also like to be able to check a person's profile and see their current lineup and hero. I'd give it 5 stars if that stuff gets added. Beyond that it's an interesting and fun, new take on tower defense games. Also, you have to buy separate passes for each event and the passes aren't the standard 5 USD. They're like $11-15 USD. Bit of a money grab

star_5.text: Five stars for one reason. They have perfected ad management. Litteraly every other ad supported game out there needs to learn from this game. The developers are geniuses. There are no ads, but if you can watch ads for extra, little stuff. It is incentive based. Watch the ad, get a small reward. And the ads are consistent. 30 secods flat everytime. So if you want no ads, you don't have to see any. But if you want that extra bit of in game goodies, you can watch a bunch and get rewarded. Love it.

I love the game, but some things have to get fixed for example: 1. To report a player in co-op mode for not participating. - They're wasting the active players time and ability to get better rewards 2. Lower your prices. Most people wont spend more than $9.99 in game, & I won't spend 29.99, 49.99 & higher 3. Near impossible to get a legendary card & when you finally get one, it's usually one you already have. Otherwise good game But seriously fix the above Or fix players not participating

After being very frustrated lately with game apps that charge ridiculous amounts of money, and more frustrated with the company's refusal to admit that their game is built with multiple tactics of frustrating their players into using real money to buy their way through the game, this game is refreshing. I feel it's fair to the players who seek to have fun, and not be held back if they don't have the means/interest to spend real money on fabricated currency for games. Fun, fair, and balanced.

Very active game play. Find myself playing for hours. I haven't spent money, but I do watch ads in order to advance. No demanding ads that interfere with game play. They have changed co-op games so you can play all you want. Pvp games now are quick play when you don't have time for a long battle. I actually enjoy it more than when I started.

Addictive to say the least. Good mix of a merge game, clash royal type, and TD all in one place. Every time I tell a friend I geek out about how I found a combination of my favorite games in one spot. Those games being any merge game, clash royal by supercell, and Kingdom Rush/bloons TD5. 10 out of 10 with only one complaint regarding the amount of sales and outrageous pricing (comparitive to other games and my understanding of the game thus far) on store bundles.

This is such a fun game! With no adverts (unless you watch them to get free in-game rewards). I really like the look of the game and all of the different characters and special abilities too. It's difficult to get more cards to upgrade the rarer characters though - I have been trying to get more Demon Hunter cards so I can upgrade her. Still a fun strategic game though!

It is a very fun game i like it very much but it's mostly pay to win. i have been playing for 5 years and i only have a couple level 9 talent legendarys and then i see people with maxed out legendarys with talents for there whole deck. I think if you dont eant to spend money on the game play untill level 9 legendarys.

ridiculously addictive the genius is that the myriad permutations & combinations of tower offense/defense characters give the player a chance at punching well above their weight, against other players; but, you really have to be clever about it (and there's the challenge that keeps me coming back) think of it as chess, with chance (as your next character to show up is randomized, which is great brain exercise as the game speed gradually increases) kudos to the developers!

this is a good game I appreciate there cooperation with any problems that arise. they might not do it on time persay but they usually do it when updates come out. there get with reading mind most things you want to happen usually happen sooner or later. I've been playing for 6 or 7 years and rather you pay or not you will always get what you need to defend or attack whatever remember advantages are the key here. THANKYOU RUSH ROYALE ILL ALWAYS BE A PARTNER OR WHATEVER YOU WANT TO CALL IT.
pretty fun, just takes a while to get the good cards. the lootbox style of getting things doesn't help either. otherwise, really fun and lots of events keeps the game interesting

This game is amazing I wish I had spotted this game ages ago I would recommend this game to all my friends and other gamers that dont play this game. I love how u can upgrade and add perks to the megas that are in this game. Game play is really gud too the only thing that I find is that some of the stuff u can buy is to expensive now but then other things is a really good price I just use the battle pass and the bells to upgrade my legendary cards so I only spend £10.49 every seasson

only been playing for a week but it's a fun game. no forced ads and I don't spend real money on games and this game gives good cards to keep play competitive and fun. I play through another app so I get money for playing and leveling up. Will check back in in a few weeks with update.
love the gameplay only downfall is just not enough ways to get resources needed to upgrade top tier cards without spending $ or every waking minute grinding.
This is basically a tower defense but endurance pvp to see who can survive longer and yes, you can play with friends… only at arena 2 though 😞
Cool characters and upgrades. legendary cards. fun, time wasting, battles. Cool characters and upgrades. legendary cards. All in all its a pretty fun game!
The new version is growing on me. I was not happy at first. It's definitely more challenging. I'm finally able to level up with some effort. It's going great ap far!
Playing against real people gives this game a level of variety that cannot be matched by AI opponents. After over 3 years it's still my go to game on a daily basis.

After 1 year of playing this game im really satifiesd but recently i lost all of my progress and now im back to zero.,.please developers find me my account back UPDATE 1 YEAR LATER ! ( AS SOON AS I PLACED THE PREVIEW I GOT TECH SUPPORT AND GOT MY ACCOUNT BACK ) LOVING THIS GAME GREAT FOR BOREDOM KILLING ! 10/10 ****UPDATE**** THE NEW UPDATE KILLED MY WHOLE PROGRESS... I WAS SAVING TONS OF MONEY AND RESOURSES TO FINALY UPGRADE MY BOW ITEM TO GOLD AND ALL OF MY HARD WORK TO ALL OF US LOST...🥲
I've been playing this game for a few years now and its very addicting, but sometimes you feel like you have to pay in order to get ahead instead of slowly upgrading everything.
officially done with Player vs Player . the match ups are so one sided, i get destroyed almost every time. otherwise the co-op is good. please fix this while I'm still alive.
